meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve tutorial hell (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome tutorial hell. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve tutorial hell
content.seo_description: Learn how to use the Antigravity project template to overcome tutorial hell. An advanced-level checklist for SaaS founders using Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell is a revenue-killer. You escape it by transitioning from passive learning to active architectural deployment. The Antigravity template provides a pre-hardened, production-ready foundation, allowing you to bypass boilerplate and focus exclusively on shipping high-value features that solve actual user pain points and drive recurring subscription revenue.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks consuming tutorials, yet your repository is a graveyard of half-baked prototypes. The 'tutorial hell' trap is designed to keep you consuming, not building. You aren't learning how to code; you're learning how to follow instructions.

It is time to pivot. Real founders don't watch videos; they ship architectures. By utilizing the Antigravity project template, you collapse the distance between ideation and production, leveraging Claude Code to enforce enterprise-grade standards from line one. Stop collecting knowledge and start accumulating equity.

steps.title: Define the Value Proposition
steps.description: Before touching the code, distill your SaaS into a single, high-value outcome. Use the template to structure the MVP around this core feature.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize an Antigravity project template for a SaaS MVP. Focus on a modular architecture that separates auth, database, and core logic.

steps.title: Automate Database Schema
steps.description: Stop manual migrations. Use Claude Code to generate your schema based on your domain model to ensure strict type safety.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the Prisma schema for a subscription-based SaaS, including User, Subscription, and Project entities with proper relations.

steps.title: Implement Stripe/Auth Integration
steps.description: Monetization is the primary indicator of product-market fit. Integrate billing early to validate your pricing model.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the Antigravity auth and billing module to handle user registration and Stripe checkout sessions.

steps.title: Rapid Feature Iteration
steps.description: Use Claude Code to iterate on your core feature logic, maintaining the high standards set by the Antigravity template.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a core service layer for the primary SaaS feature, ensuring it respects the existing dependency injection patterns.

steps.title: Deployment and Observability
steps.description: Prepare your infrastructure for production traffic with automated monitoring and logging.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up CI/CD pipeline and monitoring configuration for the current project using the Antigravity deployment standards.

pro_tips: Treat your code as a liability, not an asset. If a feature doesn't directly contribute to ARR, delete the code.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests *before* the implementation code to ensure your logic is sound from the start.
Always modularize your business logic into services, keeping controllers thin and strictly for routing.
Leverage the Antigravity template's built-in error handling to prevent silent failures in production.
Focus on shipping the 'Happy Path' first; edge cases are for version 2.0 after you have your first paying customer.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, immediately set up a feedback loop with five potential users to validate your core value proposition before adding more features.
content.conversion_block: You have the blueprint and the tools to dismantle the tutorial trap once and for all. Stop waiting for permission to be a founder and start building the future you envisioned. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
